name: ai-product-design-runtime
description: AI Product Design Runtime — from requirements to frontend

scripts.build: npm run build -w @apdr/core && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-shared && npm run build -w @apdr/orchestrator && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-design-artifacts && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-research && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-preview && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-repo && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-diagram && npm run build -w @apdr/java-code-reviewer
scripts.orchestrator:dev: npm run build -w @apdr/core && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-shared && npm run build -w @apdr/orchestrator && node packages/orchestrator/dist/cli.js
scripts.dev:all-mcp: npm run build -w @apdr/core && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-shared && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-design-artifacts && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-research && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-preview && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-repo && npm run build -w @apdr/mcp-diagram
scripts.start:all-mcp: echo 'Run each MCP server individually or use .cursor/mcp.json for Cursor/Codex integration'
scripts.java-review:sample: npm run build -w @apdr/java-code-reviewer && node packages/java-code-reviewer/dist/cli.js --path packages/java-code-reviewer/fixtures/team-violations --rules packages/java-code-reviewer/rules/team-backend-rules.yaml --format html,json,console,markdown --out packages/java-code-reviewer/reports
